examples: Gimme the bucket--I won't be gone only a minute.
"Gimme a break, kid! You know how much those things cost?"
Just you gimme the hundred dollars and I don't want no di'monds.
"EFH's capital structure is untenable, " says Carl Blake, analyst at bond research firm Gimme Credit.
Gimme Credit analyst David Novosel today cut his credit score on Dell to deteriorating from stable.
